injuries.comment: Hanfin is going to be Out for Thursday's (Oct. 16) matchup with the Boston Bruins.
Howden is Out for Thursday's (Oct. 16) game but could return on Saturday (Oct. 18) according to Jesse Granger of The Athletic.
The Bruins said that Lindholm is OUT for Thursday's (Oct. 16) game against the Golden Knights, per Adam Pellerin of NESN.
